text_block_list.text: I'm walking by the river on my day<n>off, when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... wheeze... I'm beat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
How about we take a break? We've<n>both got
races coming up, so we<n>can't be overworking
ourselves.
choice_data_list: You two sure are working hard.
You two sure are working hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wasn't exactly planning to get<n>so carried
away, but then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I think that'll do it for today. I<n>know I'm up
against some real<n>speedsters in my next race, but
I<n>don't want to overdo it...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm? That voice...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I knew it was you, Nature. Are you<n>returning to the
dorm?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, yeah. Can you believe it? All<n>this sweat
from a light jog... That's<n>what I get for trying to do
solo training<n>for once.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Well, I regret to say that I<n>cannot let you
return to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? How come?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You see, we are in the middle of a...<n>situation.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ikunoooo! I'm STARVING! I can't wait<n>any longer!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hang on. Nature?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: It looks like the wait was well worth it,<n>Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hm?! The wait was whale worthit?! When it comes to seafood, I'm afan of scallops myself!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Ah yes, I see you had a whale of atime waiting patiently to have a runwith Nature.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's right! I was waiting like a<n>beached
whale! And now it's time to<n>race, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, no, I was about to head back to<n>the—gahhh!
Don't give me those<n>goo-goo eyes!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that's how I ended up in this<n>here situation.
To be fair, this has<n>been some good extra training
for me<n>so far.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yup! It's been great for me too! In<n>fact... I'm all
done! Let's go home!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...What?! We're going back already?!<n>Do you
always turbo boost through<n>your training like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez... Now there's someone else<n>in front of
the dorm. What's the deal<n>this time?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Hold up! You're the kids from<n>where I volunteer!
Now what's going<n>on here?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Kids
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one! Welcome to the "Go<n>Nature"
party!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, so... We heard that you're gonna<n>run against
real fast racers in your<n>next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The kids all wanted to show you their<n>support, so
they set up this party for<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
For me? Hold on... Is this why you<n>stopped me
from going to the dorms<n>before?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Heh, indeed it was. The two of us<n>offered to
distract you and buy them<n>more time. After all, we
also wish to<n>support you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature, we know how hard you've<n>been working
every day in the<n>lead-up to your race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You might've laughed and said<n>you didn't
stand a chance when you<n>saw the racer list, but
you can't trick<n>us!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, I'm kinda having trouble<n>processing all
this... So you guys<n>knew I was practicing on my
own?<n>Oh, geez...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiiigh... I don't know if you shouldcall them "great" or just plain "nosy."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But still, I can't believe you did all this<n>for me.
Seeing all this...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even I can't help thinking I've gotta<n>win! And
that's totally not like me!<n>Gahhhh!

Despite her disgruntled complaints,<n>Nice Nature
smiles and joins the<n>party. It looks like the extra
support<n>has motivated her even more.
